title: agropyron strigosum
intro: Agropyron strigosum, also known as big bluestem or silver bluestem, is a species of grass native to North America, characterized by its distinctive blue-green foliage and tall, stately growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Agropyron strigosum include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. Agropyron strigosum can be prepared as herbal tea or decoction, and it has also been used in salves and poultices to support wound healing and skin health.
